subject: [DCAEGEN2] Add external configmaps
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Add external configmaps

Add config maps which will be used by dcaegen2: ves-open-api and ves component.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2576
Signed-off-by: Zebek Bogumil <bogumil.zebek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Iaf5df2d69cc53d4f420e340c0336f4920fef6d6d

This is only part of overall solution for VES schema management. As the required files are statically loaded under resources and will be made available to VEScollector pod, offline install should work. 

However there is work currently underway to migrate VEScollector deployment via helm, thinking dcaegen2 may not be right place holder to add this config-map. Or we add under dcaegen2 for now (to not hold up this change) and switch later to dcaegen2-service when VES is migrated
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
